Arrow #84: Anton

More Details for Arrow #84

Location: Located on the southeast corner of the intersection at Main Street and 1st Street.

Coordinates: 33.8072345, -102.1637231

Installed: May 6, 2016

Dedicated: August 26, 2016

Marker Text:

19th c. Comanches & earlier Indians hunted along Yellow House Draw watered by streams near Anton

Get Directions via Google Maps

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
